mapper.select: SELECT password FROM relative_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relative_user (username, password, full_name, phone) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, '未填写', CONCAT('REG_', SUBSTRING(MD5(#{username}), 1, 28)))
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, full_name, phone, open_id, created_at, updated_at FROM relative_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE relative_user SET password = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM relative_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
